name: English Gingered Brandy Snaps (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, sugar, corn syrup, and molasses in a medium saucepan.
2. Heat mixture over medium heat just until butter is melted.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, ground ginger, and ground nutmeg.
4. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture.
5. Add brandy to the mixture.
6. Drop the mixture by teaspoonfuls, 6 inches apart, onto greased cookie sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes.
8. Let cool for 30 seconds.
9. Ease cookies off the cookie sheets with a spatula.
10. Roll each brandy snap loosely around a 6-inch tapered metal tube, with the outside of the brandy snap facing outward.
11. Cool on wire racks.
12. Shortly before serving, whip cream and add sugar to make filling.
13. Using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, fill the cavity in each rolled brandy snap from both ends.
Note: If brandy snaps begin to harden before rolling, return them to the oven for 30 seconds to soften.
